expected_failure_modes: Hovering indefinitely to collect dense rewards without landing.
Crashing aggressively to end episode early and avoid negative control cost.
Landing on one leg while fulfilling most dense criteria, bypassing terminal success.
risk_notes: Dense rewards may dominate if terminal success is too infrequent; weight tuning needed.
Lack of explicit crash penalty may encourage unsafe descents; future safety constraints could mitigate.
All formulas use only primitive variables, avoiding hidden state leakage.
